name: /postmortem surfaces standards-layer (SIRL) keyword matches for a bug description aligned with a known source namespace per F-1
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/postmortem.sh" 'XSS via unsanitized input' 2>out.txt && grep -q 'standards-layer' out.txt && grep -q 'owasp-asvs' out.txt && echo matched 1>&2
